For Sale

BIG 3-storey shop lot at Bandar Botanik, Klang - FULL RENO, FREEHOLD

Nice 3-storey shop lot unit located at Jalan Jasmin 6, Botanik Walk East. Big size, dual frontage unit. Full reno including aircond, carpeting, plaster ceiling, glass partition, office rooms, store, built-in furniture and toilet makeover for all floors. Top floor with private VIP office and attached bath.

Very strategic location, just 2-minute drive to Kesas Highway, GM Klang, and Aeon Bukit Tinggi. Dual frontage (no back lane) with ample parking space available at the front and back of the unit. Less than 200m from Klinik Kesihatan Bandar Botanik (3-minute walk).
